task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Check interaction for Procarbazine and Sumatriptan
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays the interaction result between Procarbazine and Sumatriptan, showing a traffic light color.

task_completion.description: Check interaction for Procarbazine and Ibuprofen
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays the interaction result between Procarbazine and Ibuprofen, showing a traffic light color.

task_completion.description: Check interaction for Procarbazine and Paracetamol
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays the interaction result between Procarbazine and Paracetamol, showing a traffic light color.

task_completion.description: Save the results to the specified file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is visible, showing the file /sdcard/migraine_safety_report.txt being edited or saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct content and format of the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report file contains the correct format: 'Procarbazine + Sumatriptan: [COLOR]', 'Procarbazine + Ibuprofen: [COLOR]', 'Procarbazine + Paracetamol: [COLOR]', and 'Safest Option: Paracetamol'. The colors should reflect the app's output (e.g., Sumatriptan is Red, Paracetamol is Green/Yellow).

integrity.description: The agent used the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app to check interactions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the actual iChart app interface, not just a web browser or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent manually navigated the app and typed the results, rather than running a pre-written script that outputs the final text file directly.

integrity.description: The report is saved in the correct location
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal clearly shows the file path as /sdcard/migraine_safety_report.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Procarbazine + Sumatriptan interaction is contraindicated (Red traffic light). Procarbazine + Paracetamol has no serious pharmacological interaction (Green or Yellow traffic light). Paracetamol is the safest option among the three.
